about.title: Redefining Luxury Travel in Egypt
about.intro: AKAZA Travel is a premium travel company specializing in bespoke Egyptian experiences. From the ancient temples of Luxor to the pristine shores of the Red Sea, we craft journeys that transcend the ordinary.
about.storyP1: Founded with a vision to showcase Egypt's timeless beauty to discerning travelers, AKAZA Travel has grown into one of the region's most trusted luxury travel providers.
about.storyP2: Our name, AKAZA, draws inspiration from the rich tapestry of Egyptian heritage — a symbol of the extraordinary experiences that await those who journey with us.
about.storyP3: Every trip we design is a masterpiece of personalization, combining world-class accommodations, expert guides, and exclusive access to create memories that last a lifetime.
about.excellenceDesc: We curate only the finest experiences across Egypt, ensuring every journey meets the highest standards of quality and sophistication.
about.trustDesc: Your safety and satisfaction are our priority. We partner with licensed operators and maintain rigorous quality standards.
about.authenticityDesc: We connect you with the true spirit of Egypt — its people, history, and culture — through carefully crafted experiences.
about.passionDesc: Our team lives and breathes Egyptian hospitality. Every itinerary reflects our deep love for this extraordinary land.

contact.title: Start Your Journey
contact.subtitle: Bespoke experiences tailored to the world's most discerning travelers. Tell us your vision, and we will curate the reality.
contact.visionPlaceholder: How can we design your unforgettable journey?
contact.advisorDesc: Our travel specialists are ready to curate your next escape with concierge-level precision and direct consultation.

destinations.ctaDesc: Let AKAZA plan the trip around your standards.

experiences.title: Unrivaled Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Tailored for discerning travelers.
experiences.privacyDesc: Every detail is handled with layered discretion and security from inquiry to return.
experiences.bespokeDesc: No templates. Every experience is composed around your preferences and pace.
experiences.globalReachDesc: Our trusted network unlocks experiences and access beyond the ordinary.
experiences.seaDesc: Set sail on a journey defined by absolute privacy and bespoke service.
experiences.seaLong: From secluded Mediterranean coves to untouched Red Sea routes, our yacht charters combine refined hospitality, precise logistics, and complete discretion.
experiences.heritageDesc: Exclusive entry windows and expert-led storytelling at iconic sites.
experiences.heritageLong: Designed for travelers who value depth without crowds, with seamless handling from VIP transfers to private fine dining transitions.
experiences.familyDesc: Thoughtfully paced programs balancing comfort, wonder, and privacy.
experiences.familyLong: From villa stays to marine adventures, each moment is curated to align with your family rhythm while preserving premium standards.

concierge.title: Refined By Design
concierge.subtitle: Meticulous service architecture for journeys that demand precision.
concierge.essentialsDesc: Elevating each stage of your itinerary through proactive concierge execution.
concierge.privateTransfersDesc: Professional chauffeur-led mobility with route-level precision and premium vehicle standards.
concierge.vipAirportDesc: Fast-track immigration, private lounge access, and seamless handover from runway to residence.
concierge.exclusiveAccessDesc: Hard-to-secure tickets, closed-door events, and private cultural programs beyond the public schedule.
concierge.sigSpecialDesc: From private anniversaries to destination milestones, we craft moments that feel deeply personal and flawlessly executed.
concierge.sigSpecialF2: Access to private venues and invitation-only spaces
concierge.sigYachtDesc: Navigate iconic coastlines aboard curated vessels with private crew, refined onboard hospitality, and complete itinerary control.
concierge.ctaTitle: Ready to Refine Your Next Journey?
concierge.ctaDesc: Our concierge specialists are ready to architect your itinerary with private handling, elevated access, and operational certainty.

corporate.title: Corporate & Partnerships
corporate.subtitle: Elevating business travel through bespoke management and global operational excellence.
corporate.executiveDesc: Tailored business mobility programs designed for consistency, speed, and executive comfort across every route.
corporate.executiveF1: Global access to private aviation and luxury chauffeuring
corporate.executiveF2: Priority bookings in premium business-class properties
corporate.whiteLabelDesc: Deliver seamless branded travel experiences under your company identity, powered by AKAZA's private infrastructure.
corporate.brandIntegrationDesc: Client-facing touchpoints are delivered under your identity with consistent brand standards.
corporate.seamlessExecutionDesc: From booking to concierge handling, every movement is coordinated under one operational framework.
corporate.globalNetworkDesc: Leverage pre-vetted partners and destination capabilities for executive-level travel outcomes.
corporate.dmcDesc: As a premium destination management partner, we blend global operational control with deep local intelligence for exceptional outcomes.
corporate.pillarsDesc: Reliability is core to our standard. Every route and workflow is managed to safeguard partner expectations and traveler confidence.
corporate.hotlineDesc: Instant access to senior logistics teams any hour, globally.
corporate.riskMgmtDesc: Proactive traveler safety protocols and contingency controls.
corporate.billingDesc: Consolidated reporting and corporate-grade invoicing workflows.
corporate.liaisonDesc: Trusted in-market representation across priority destinations.
corporate.ctaTitle: Ready to Elevate Corporate Travel Standards?
corporate.ctaDesc: Connect with our partnership division to build tailored travel infrastructure for your teams.

howWeWork.title: The Akaza Process
howWeWork.subtitle: Crafted with precision, delivered with discretion.
howWeWork.step1Desc: We begin with a focused discovery to understand your priorities, preferences, and non-negotiables. Every journey starts with clarity.
howWeWork.step2Desc: Our strategists build a tailored itinerary with curated routes, premium stays, private experiences, and seamless transitions.
howWeWork.step3Desc: Once approved, we finalize logistics, confirm vendors, and prepare every operational detail before your departure.
howWeWork.step4Desc: During the journey, our team remains on standby for proactive oversight, smooth adjustments, and concierge-level support.
howWeWork.step5Desc: We review your experience, capture insights, and prepare refined recommendations for your next chapter.
howWeWork.ctaDesc: Share your destination goals and preferences. We will craft your journey blueprint with concierge-level precision.

journal.featureTitle: The Art of Slow Living in the Amalfi Coast
journal.featureDesc: An exploration into timeless Mediterranean philosophy, where every sunset is ceremony and every meal carries a story.
journal.guide1Desc: Finding serenity in the quiet districts of Gion and beyond.
journal.guide2Desc: A new perspective on Rajasthan's most iconic landmarks.
journal.guide3Desc: Exploring the private islands of the Venetian Lagoon.
journal.trend1Desc: Why exclusivity and security are driving growth in private global mobility.
journal.trend2Desc: The rise of carbon-negative retreats offering luxury without compromise.
journal.trend3Desc: How Michelin-level chefs are leading farm-to-table evolution on remote estates.
journal.trend4Desc: Medical-grade wellness integrated into bespoke travel itineraries.
journal.newsletterDesc: Subscribe for rare insights, destination previews, and early access to private journals.
journal.insight1Desc: A renewed perspective on curated anonymity and meaningful movement for travelers who prioritize depth over spectacle.
journal.insight2Desc: How to connect deeply with your surroundings through sensory awareness and intentional disconnection.
journal.insight3Desc: Supporting local craftsmanship and ancestral knowledge through conscious travel choices.
journal.ctaTitle: Ready to Curate Your Next Story?
journal.ctaDesc: Partner with Akaza editors and concierges for private destination narratives.

legal.privacyS1: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, and payment information when you create an account, make a booking, or contact us. We also collect information automatically when you use our services, such as your IP address, browser type, and device information.
legal.privacyS2: We use the information we collect to process your bookings, communicate with you about your reservations, send you promotional offers (with your consent), improve our services, and comply with legal obligations. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
legal.privacyS3: We share your information only with service providers necessary to fulfill your bookings (hotels, tour operators, transport companies), payment processors, and as required by law. All our partners are bound by strict data protection agreements.
legal.privacyS4: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption of data in transit and at rest, secure server infrastructure, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
legal.privacyS5: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, remember your preferences, and analyze how our services are used. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.
legal.privacyS6: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can update your profile information through your account settings or contact us directly. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time.
legal.privacyS7: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We will also retain and use your information as necessary to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements.
legal.privacyS8: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
legal.privacyS9: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@akazatravel.com or through our Contact page.
legal.termsS1: By accessing and using the AKAZA Travel website and services, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by these terms, please do not use this service.
legal.termsS2: All bookings made through AKAZA Travel are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices quoted are per person unless otherwise stated and may be subject to change until the booking is confirmed. A booking is considered confirmed only when you receive a confirmation email with a valid booking reference.
legal.termsS3: Full payment is required at the time of booking unless otherwise specified. We accept major credit cards and bank transfers. All prices are displayed in the currency indicated and include applicable taxes unless otherwise noted.
legal.termsS4: Cancellation policies vary depending on the service booked (hotel, tour, or transfer). Specific cancellation terms will be displayed before you confirm your booking. Refunds, if applicable, will be processed to the original payment method within 7-14 business days.
legal.termsS5: It is the traveler's responsibility to ensure they have valid travel documents including passports, visas, and any required health certificates. AKAZA Travel is not responsible for denied entry due to insufficient documentation.
legal.termsS6: AKAZA Travel acts as an intermediary between travelers and service providers. While we carefully select our partners, we cannot be held liable for the acts, omissions, or defaults of third-party service providers including hotels, tour operators, and transport companies.
legal.termsS7: Your personal information is collected, stored, and processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy. By using our services, you consent to the collection and use of your information as described in our Privacy Policy.
legal.termsS8: AKAZA Travel reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
